skills.name: auto-reply
skills.title: Auto-reply
skills.description: Reply to a contact's notifications via the messaging app on screen.

skills.name: morning-briefing
skills.title: Morning Briefing
skills.description: Reads weather, calendar, and unread email at wake-up.

skills.name: smart-forward
skills.title: Smart Forward
skills.description: Catch a notification, summarise, forward to another contact.

skills.name: notification-summarise-and-act
skills.title: Notification Summary
skills.description: Read recent notifications, group by app, summarise, suggest actions.

skills.name: calculate-hash
skills.title: Calculate Hash
skills.description: Compute the SHA-1 hash of a given text via the WebView's WebCrypto API.

skills.name: interactive-map
skills.title: Interactive Map
skills.description: Embed a Google Maps view for a location. Returns a webview URL.

skills.name: kitchen-adventure
skills.title: Kitchen Adventure
skills.description: Text-based RPG where every kitchen appliance is a sentient character. Pure prompt skill.

skills.name: mood-tracker
skills.title: Mood Tracker
skills.description: Log daily 1-10 mood scores and view trend dashboards. Stores in WebView localStorage.

skills.name: qr-code
skills.title: QR Code
skills.description: Generate a 512x512 QR code PNG for any URL. Requires internet (cdnjs qrcode.js).

skills.name: query-wikipedia
skills.title: Query Wikipedia
skills.description: Fuzzy-search Wikipedia for a topic and return the introduction plus infobox.

skills.name: text-spinner
skills.title: Text Spinner
skills.description: Render a 3D-spinning text label inside a webview embed.

skills.name: virtual-piano
skills.title: Virtual Piano
skills.description: Playable 88-key piano with sampled note audio. Bundles ~7.7 MB of MP3 samples.
